zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De Belgrave於1386年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福時，她的父親Thomas Belgrave38歲，母親Joan de Pulford38歲。她於1384年之前與Robert de Legh III結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國倫敦享年34歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾阿德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De Belgrave于1386年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福时，她的父亲Thomas Belgrave38岁，母亲Joan de Pulford38岁。她于1384年之前与Robert de Legh III结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年在英国倫敦享年34岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾阿德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De Belgrave was born in 1386, in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, her father, Thomas Belgrave, was 38 and her mother, Joan de Pulford, was 38. She married Robert de Legh III before 1384. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1420, in London, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Adlington, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De Belgrave est née en 1386, à Belgrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Belgrave, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan de Pulford, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Legh III avant 1384. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Adlington, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De Belgrave 1386 in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Belgrave 38 und ihre Mutter Joan de Pulford 38. Sie hat vor 1384 Robert de Legh III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 34 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Adlington, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Belgrave è nata il nel 1386 nel Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas Belgrave, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Joan de Pulford, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Legh III prima del 1384. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1420, nel London, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Adlington, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De Belgraveが1386年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルグラブで生まれた時，父Thomas Belgraveは38歳，母Joan de Pulfordは38歳であった。1384年以前にRobert de Legh IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年にイギリスロンドンで34歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアアドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De Belgrave(이)가 1386년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Belgrave(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Pulford(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1384년 이전 Robert de Legh III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 런던에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 애들링턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Adlington, Cheshire East & Cheshire, Nor: Adlington, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Belgrave nasceu em 1386, em Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Belgrave, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Pulford, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Legh III antes 1384. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1420, em London, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De Belgrave родилась в 1386 г. в местности белграв, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Belgrave было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Pulford, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Legh III перед 1384 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel De Belgrave nació en 1386, en Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Belgrave, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan de Pulford, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Robert de Legh III antes de 1384. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1420, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
